---
title: "Bird Sightings at Sea"
date: 2026-04-14
author: Cole Baril
description: "Bird sightings near New Zealand."
image: preview.png
categories: [animals, maps]
---

## Load Packages

```{r, load_packages}
require(pacman)
p_load(tidytuesdayR, tidyverse, trashpanda, magick, rnaturalearth, sf, hexbin)
```

## Load Data

```{r, tt_data}
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2026-04-14')
beaufort_scale <- tuesdata$beaufort_scale
birds <- tuesdata$birds
sea_states <- tuesdata$sea_states
ships <- tuesdata$ships 
```

## Plot

```{r, plot, fig.align='center', out.width="100%"}
bird_df <- birds |> 
  select(1:4, count) |> 
  left_join(ships, by = "record_id")

# Load world map
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_hex(
    data = bird_df,
    aes(x = longitude, y = latitude),
    bins = 50,
    alpha = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = world, fill = "grey50", color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(55, 180),
    ylim = c(-75, -15)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c("Number of Birds Sighted", trans = "log10", labels = add_commas) +
  theme_void(base_size = 15) +
  add_caption_cwb() +
  labs(title = "Bird Sightings at Sea, 1969 - 1990") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.justification = "left",
        legend.title.position = "top",
        legend.key.width = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.box.margin = margin(l = 10),
        plot.margin = margin(b = 10),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 25))


# Save and display images
current_dir <- dirname(knitr::current_input())
plot_name <- "bird_sightings.png"

ggsave(plot = plot, 
       dpi = "screen",
       width = 12,
       height = 10,
       device = ragg::agg_png,
       filename = file.path(current_dir, plot_name))


# Read the big plot
img <- image_read(file.path(current_dir, plot_name))

# Force 16:9 aspect ratio with minimal padding
# Target size: 1200x675 px (16:9)
img_card <- image_scale(img, "1200x675")           # scale to fit inside 16:9
img_card <- image_extent(
  img_card,
  geometry = "1200x675",
  gravity = "center"
)

# Save as card preview
image_write(img_card, path = file.path(current_dir, "preview.png"))

knitr::include_graphics(
  file.path(current_dir, plot_name)
)
```

## References
```{r, ref, echo = TRUE, results = 'asis', comment = NA}
cite_packages(format = "rmd")
```
